intro: Calymella polypodioides, also known as Polypodium calymella, is a type of plant species in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly referred to as a species of fern. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which provide relief and promote healing.
